narrative:
Jack/New Lebanon-B (precinct in Montgomery County) has 963 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
